purpose: Vertical group of mutually-exclusive RadioButton options. Composed at plugin-time from items[] — each item becomes a RadioButton instance.
whenToUse: Single-select from 2-7 options where all should be visible
Form fields with discrete value choices
whenNotToUse: More than 7 options — use Select or ComboBox
dontRules: Do not allow zero-selected state when a default is reasonable
Do not use RadioButtonGroup for binary toggles (use Switch)

layoutGuidance.placement: Place RadioButtonGroup inside a compatible container (Form, Dialog, Panel).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for input.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
